title: Amazon Marketplace Growth: 47% Revenue Lift in 6 Months
summary: Rebuilt Amazon listing architecture, launched the Renew programme, and optimised Buy Box strategy to reverse a revenue decline and deliver sustained marketplace growth.
challenge: Amazon revenue had fallen 22% YoY due to listing suppressions, inconsistent pricing against competitors, and no structured approach to the Renew certified refurbished programme. Buy Box win rate sat at 71% against a category benchmark of 90%+.
strategy: Prioritised account health recovery first, then layered Renew as an incremental revenue stream while rebuilding core ASIN performance through enhanced A+ content, keyword architecture, and dynamic repricing tied to fulfilment metrics.
implementation: Audited 420+ ASINs for suppression triggers and fixed 89 listing compliance issues within 3 weeks
Launched Amazon Renew programme with 65 SKUs, custom grading SOPs, and warranty messaging
Implemented repricing rules aligned to FBA inventory levels and competitor Buy Box data
Refreshed A+ content and storefront modules to improve conversion on top 20 revenue-driving ASINs
Built weekly Seller Central reporting dashboard tracking BSR, Buy Box %, and session-to-order rate
